name: 04_master_orchestrator
description: Master daily batch pipeline. Runs Bronze → Silver → Gold in sequence with fail-fast error handling and email notifications on failure. Schedule: daily at 02:00 UTC (04:00 Berlin / 05:00 Istanbul).

activities.name: Stage_1_Bronze
activities.description: Execute bronze ingestion pipeline (00_reference_data_loader + 01_bronze_ingestion in parallel).

activities.name: On_Bronze_Failure
activities.description: Halt the master pipeline immediately if bronze ingestion fails. Silver and Gold cannot run on stale data.

typeProperties.message: Bronze ingestion failed. Master pipeline aborted. Check 01_bronze_batch_pipeline run logs.

activities.name: On_Silver_Failure
activities.description: Halt if silver transformation fails. Gold analytics depend on clean silver data.

typeProperties.message: Silver transformation failed. Master pipeline aborted. Check 02_silver_transform_pipeline run logs.

activities.name: Stage_3_Gold
activities.description: Execute gold analytics pipeline (KPI + Anomaly → Simulation → Compliance → Recommendations).

activities.name: On_Gold_Failure
activities.description: Halt if gold analytics fail. Power BI reports should not refresh on incomplete data.

typeProperties.message: Gold analytics failed. Power BI refresh may be stale. Check 03_gold_analytics_pipeline run logs.

activities.name: Pipeline_Success_Log
activities.description: All stages completed successfully. Power BI Direct Lake will reflect new data on next report open/refresh.

triggers.name: DailySchedule_0200_UTC
triggers.description: Runs every day at 02:00 UTC — 04:00 Berlin / 05:00 Istanbul. Chosen to complete before business hours and avoid daytime Fabric capacity contention.
